test.name: bm25a optional avgdl argument
test.db_insert: INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ( 1, 'apple short' ), ( 2, 'apple apple apple filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler' ), ( 3, 'banana other' );

queries.sphinxql:
select id, weight() as w from test where match('apple') option ranker=expr('1000000*bm25a(1.2,0.75)'), idf='plain,tfidf_unnormalized';
select id, weight() as w from test where match('apple') option ranker=expr('1000000*bm25a(1.2,0.75,256)'), idf='plain,tfidf_unnormalized';
